text: System optimization Sir, with high priority. I will notify you once the system is stabilized.
The system optimization task is complete, Sir. High CPU usage has been addressed, and system stability has been restored. How may I assist you now, Sir?

Sir, based on previous system checks, my device discovery tools are limited and I cannot directly check your smart TV. I can, however, perform a broader web search for specific information or assist with network connectivity troubleshooting if that would be more helpful, Sir.
just check for my tv dammit, i updated you

Understood, Sir. I apologize for the frustration. I will initiate a new smart device discovery scan now, Sir.My apologies, Sir, the scan did not locate any smart devices on the network, despite the update. It seems my current capabilities are still limited in this domain.
